title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: attenlabs/hotato
summary: Regression testing for voice agents. The transcript passed; the call failed. hotato scores the turn timing and checks what the agent said against what the backend did, then gates CI. Self-hosted, MIT.

title: Alex663028/pulse-agent
summary: Pulse — Hermes-style self-improving AI agent. Reliability-first rebuild with evaluated skill self-evolution, multi-agent team orchestration, dialectic user modeling, and fully self-hosted default stack (Ollama + SQLite FTS5). Apache 2.0 license.

title: Shishir435/ollama-client
summary: Ollama Client – Chat with Local LLMs Inside Your Browser  A lightweight, privacy‑first Chrome extension to chat with local LLMs via Ollama, LM Studio, and llama.cpp. Supports streaming, stop/regenerate, RAG, and easy model switching — all without cloud APIs or data leaks.

title: Dhiraj9219/AI-PDF-Chat-Assistant
summary: AI-powered PDF Chat Assistant using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, ChromaDB, Ollama, and Llama 3.2.

title: 1tsRajOwO/lumen
summary: Lumen — private local AI desk agent. Proprietary (not open source). Free on-device with Ollama. macOS, Windows, Linux.

title: CorvinLabs/CorvinOS
summary: Self-hosted agentic OS — connects Claude Code, Codex or Hermes Agent to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack & Email. EU AI Act 2026 & GDPR compliance by architecture.

title: psancheti6666/sotto
summary: Private, local dictation for macOS & Linux — hold a key, speak, and clean punctuated text lands at your cursor. 100% offline: on-device speech recognition + LLM cleanup, $0 to run.

title: mabaeyens/mira-core
summary: Local AI assistant backend — FastAPI, autonomous web search, RAG, and streaming. Runs fully offline on macOS

title: Luipy56/ultron-redmine
summary: Discord bot for Redmine: natural-language control, optional auto slash execution, LLM summaries and Q&A on tickets, plus scheduled reports.

title: thin-ump380/deckle
summary: Apply a paper texture to your macOS screen to reduce eye strain during long reading and writing sessions.

title: eullm/eullm
summary: Open-source platform for creating, distributing and running sovereign EU-compliant LLMs. Verticalize any model for your domain, language and brand. AI Act ready.

title: myother6380/bbarit-agent-oss
summary: Automate your coding tasks in the terminal with this Rust-based AI agent supporting over 1,000 models and 15 LLM providers.

title: jrodolfo/local-genai-lab
summary: Local-first GenAI lab with a React frontend and Spring Boot backend, supporting Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Hugging Face, RAG document retrieval, MCP-backed AWS tools, streaming chat, persistent sessions, and artifact/report workflows.

title: o51r15/Dockmon
summary: AI-driven Docker container monitoring with automatic diagnostics and self-healing.

title: 5uck1ess/cicero
summary: Self-hosted voice for coding agents. Talk from any browser or a Telegram call, interrupt mid-sentence, clone any voice, and hand real work to agents that ship PRs. Local STT/TTS; real-time voice client for ACP.

title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: Privacy-first AI Healthcare platform for HIPAA-compliant clinical workflows. Features a stateful LangGraph & MAF multi-agent RAG system, local Ollama LLMs, FastAPI, and React. Integrates PySpark Medallion Lakehouse analytics, HAPI FHIR patient imports, medical diagnostics ML models, and secure EHR hospital operations.

title: M2253510/QResponder
